# -----------------------------------
# KiCad 7 / KiCad 8 Temporary Files
# -----------------------------------

# Auto-backups generated by KiCad
*-backups/
*.bak
*.bck
*.tmp

# Local user interface settings (window positions, active layers)
*.kicad_prl

# Custom worksheet layouts (unless you designed a custom title block)
*.kicad_wks

# Footprint and 3D model cache files
fp-info-cache

# Autorouter files (if you ever use FreeRouting)
*.dsn
*.ses

# -----------------------------------
# OS Generated Junk
# -----------------------------------
.DS_Store
.DS_Store?
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
ehthumbs.db
Thumbs.db
